data.title: RED: Create test for onboarding Semgrep installation and test quality config
data.description:
## Description
Create test verifying onboarding detects project languages and configures test quality tooling.

### File Impact
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-semgrep.sh — Create
- .test-index — Edit

## Testing Mode
RED

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-onboarding-semgrep.sh
